title: every coin link is a billboard
body: share a coin anywhere and it unfurls into a live picture card — name, avatar, holdings, story. plus a sitemap, so search engines can finally find the coins.

title: the big-network wave
body: the galaxy streams in tiers (big clusters first, the rest behind), the grid paginates instead of downloading everything, and quiet tabs stop refetching — kascov now scales past 168k coins without breaking a sweat.

title: analytics · the network at a glance
body: births against retirements over the whole history, coins by contract type, a survival curve, and the indexer's own reorg ledger — every chart drawn from the same feeds the page already serves.

title: make a smart coin without writing code
body: pick a covenant, fill in the parties and amounts in plain terms, and deploy it on testnet-10 in one click — byte-perfect script assembled in your browser, no toolchain.

title: a page for every coin
body: coin pages no longer depend on the loaded grid window — deep links, galaxy clicks and shared URLs resolve straight from the indexer, for all 168k+ coins.

title: the galaxy
body: the whole network on one zoomable map — every app at once, each dot a smart coin, each link a shared transaction. scroll to zoom, click a dot to open its life story.
